headline: Unilever plc: How a 100-Year Giant Is Re?Engineering the Consumer Goods Playbook
summary: Unilever plc is undergoing a significant transformation, re-engineering its consumer goods playbook to focus on data, sustainability, and premium brands. This strategic shift positions Unilever plc as a platform orchestrating high-velocity, high-margin products, giving it a competitive edge against rivals like Procter & Gamble and Nestlé.
